drawer.sessionHint: API access is limited by JWT and server RBAC; roles below are UI hints only.

aiDecisions.loginPrompt: Sign in to view AI decisions.
aiDecisions.title: AI decisions (`ai_decisions`)

channelReject.pivotAlternation: Last six pivots are not alternating
channelReject.barRatioUpper: Bar ratio (three highs) out of range
channelReject.barRatioLower: Bar ratio (three lows) out of range

channelScan.errorInsufficientRepaint: Not enough bars for ACP scan.
channelScan.errorInsufficientNoRepaint: ACP scan (repaint off): at least two closed bars required.
channelScan.defaultHoverTitle: Channel scan — full JSON in drawer
channelScan.drawerIntro: When “Auto scan on timeframe change” is enabled in ACP settings, the scan runs whenever chart candles load (symbol / source / limit refresh) and when the top-strip interval changes. If you enable the option after the chart is already loaded, it runs once.
channelScan.drawerFootnote: Summary lives on the top strip. For deeper history, raise Max patterns and pivot_tail_skip_max in ACP settings; for data depth, use Calculated bars and the chart limit.

chartToolbar.ohlcSourceTitle: Auto: signed in + binance/spot → live REST; other exchange → DB. Exchange: always Binance REST. DB: market_bars (JWT).

commission.symbolRequired: Enter a symbol in the top bar.

bars.databaseRequiresAuth: OHLC source is Database — sign in or switch to Auto / Exchange.

config.adminOnlyPreview: (Full `GET /api/v1/config` list is admin-only — Elliott/ACP server settings refresh below.)

dev.missingWebEnv: web/.env is missing or empty. Copy web/.env.example to .env, fill CHANGEME fields from seed output and admin password, then restart the dev server.

acp.saveHint: After a successful save, settings reload from the server.
acp.loginForSettings: Sign in to edit ACP settings.

elliottWave.dbDescription: Elliott Wave panel (web) — analysis, formations, parameters

engineDrawer.intro: qtss-worker reads engine_symbols rows, pulls candles only from the market_bars table, and writes trading_range / signal_dashboard results into analysis_snapshots. This panel reads via the API (~60s auto-refresh); the worker that builds snapshots is a separate process — tick QTSS_ENGINE_TICK_SECS (default 120s).
engineDrawer.liData: Data: market_bars must be populated for the exchange/segment/symbol/interval (Settings → Market Bars backfill, or DATABASE_URL + QTSS_KLINE_SYMBOL in the worker).
engineDrawer.liWorker: Worker: qtss-worker must run with DATABASE_URL set; otherwise snapshots and range events do not appear.
engineDrawer.liChartMapping: Chart mapping: top-bar symbol and interval must match an engine_symbols row exactly (e.g. 15m vs 4h are different targets).
engineDrawer.liPaper: Paper (F4): without a dry order (orders/dry/place), balance/fill rows may be empty — do not confuse with engine data.
engineDrawer.liConfluence: Confluence (F7): after signal_dashboard the worker writes engine_kind = confluence; raw HTTP/Nansen merge lives in data_snapshots. Disable with QTSS_CONFLUENCE_ENGINE.
engineDrawer.chkTradingRange: DB Trading Range for the active chart symbol (upper / lower / mid)
engineDrawer.chkSweepMarkers: DB sweep marker on the last bar (L sweep / S sweep)
engineDrawer.chkRangeSignals: DB range signal events (L/S entry-exit — status edge, F2)
engineDrawer.chkOpenPositionLine: Open-position entry line derived from DB (range_signal_events chain)
engineDrawer.addTargetLead: Add target — exchange/segment default: top bar (binance / spot or futures).
engineDrawer.addTargetRbacFull: Write access (add / policy / engine toggle) requires trader or admin.
engineDrawer.signalModeTitle: Range signal direction policy — spot defaults to single-sided (long), futures both sides
engineDrawer.snapshotEmpty: No snapshot rows — qtss-worker is not running or nothing has been written yet. Check market_bars and DATABASE_URL.
engineDrawer.confluenceEmpty: No confluence row yet — check the worker, QTSS_CONFLUENCE_ENGINE=off, or insufficient bars.

signalDashboard.priorityLine: Priority: signal_dashboard_v2 (English wire, schema_version 3); otherwise legacy Turkish v1 fields.
signalDashboard.insufficientBars: Insufficient bars — wait for the worker and market_bars.

paperDrawer.commissionIntro: Defaults: GET …/market/binance/commission-defaults (on engine refresh). Account: …/commission-account — Binance API key in exchange_accounts.
paperDrawer.paperQuoteEmpty: No fills yet (appears when a row exists)

drawerPanel.searchPlaceholder: Search settings (e.g. zigzag, context, confluence, paper, commission)
